QF.id: XVI Clearing, Settlement and Risk Management_59

answer.text: Periodic inspection of member premises, checking compliance with regulatory guidelines and controls

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Offline surveillance includes physical inspections, checking wrong margin reporting, verifying client-level margin collection, and ensuring regulatory compliance. **The Trap:** Real-time monitoring is ONLINE surveillance. Publishing reports and AGMs are different functions. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series VIII covers exchange regulatory compliance. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Exchanges may inspect broker premises to verify client margin segregation, risk management systems, and regulatory compliance — maintain proper records at all times.
